# ClaudeKit Documentation

> AI Development Team - Best Claude Code starter kits for solo builders with 60+ specialized agents, 100+ slash commands, and 90+ built-in skills

ClaudeKit is a comprehensive toolkit built on Claude Code, providing AI agents, slash commands, and built-in skills to accelerate software development. This documentation covers everything from installation to advanced workflows across Engineer, Marketing, and CLI kits.

## Getting Started

Essential guides to begin using ClaudeKit:

- [Getting Started Hub](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/getting-started.md): Complete onboarding guide
- [Introduction](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/getting-started/introduction.md): Overview and value proposition
- [Why ClaudeKit](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/getting-started/why-claudekit.md): Benefits and use cases
- [Concepts](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/getting-started/concepts.md): Core concepts and architecture
- [Installation](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/getting-started/installation.md): Setup instructions
- [Quick Start](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/getting-started/quick-start.md): Ship your first feature in 6 minutes
- [Upgrade Guide](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/getting-started/upgrade-guide.md): Migration from previous versions
- [Cheatsheet](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/getting-started/cheatsheet.md): Command reference
- [Migration from Commands to Skills](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/getting-started/migration-from-commands-to-skills.md): Migration guide

## CLI Reference

Command-line interface documentation:

- [CLI Overview](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/cli.md): CLI capabilities and reference
- [Installation](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/cli/installation.md): CLI setup and requirements
- [ck new](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/cli/new.md): Create new projects with templates
- [ck init](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/cli/init.md): Initialize ClaudeKit in existing projects
- [ck update](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/cli/update.md): Update ClaudeKit components
- [ck uninstall](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/cli/uninstall.md): Remove ClaudeKit
- [ck doctor](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/cli/doctor.md): Diagnose and fix issues
- [ck versions](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/cli/versions.md): Version management
- [ck migrate](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/cli/migrate.md): Migrate portable content to other AI coding providers
- [Configuration](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/cli/configuration.md): CLI configuration options

## Engineer Kit

Complete documentation for the Engineer toolkit:

- [Engineer Overview](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer.md): Engineer kit introduction

### Engineer Agents

Specialized agents for software development:

- [Agents Overview](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/agents.md): Complete agent reference

#### Planning & Research
- [planner](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/agents/planner.md): Research and implementation planning
- [researcher](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/agents/researcher.md): Best practices research with parallel search
- [brainstormer](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/agents/brainstormer.md): Solution exploration and ideation

#### Development & Quality
- [tester](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/agents/tester.md): Testing and validation
- [code-reviewer](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/agents/code-reviewer.md): Code quality and security review
- [code-simplifier](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/agents/code-simplifier.md): Autonomous code refinement
- [debugger](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/agents/debugger.md): Root cause analysis and bug fixing
- [fullstack-developer](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/agents/fullstack-developer.md): Full-stack implementation

#### Design & Content
- [ui-ux-designer](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/agents/ui-ux-designer.md): Interface design and wireframes

#### Infrastructure & Management
- [git-manager](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/agents/git-manager.md): Version control and commits
- [docs-manager](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/agents/docs-manager.md): Documentation management
- [project-manager](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/agents/project-manager.md): Progress tracking and coordination
- [journal-writer](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/agents/journal-writer.md): Decision documentation
- [mcp-manager](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/agents/mcp-manager.md): MCP server management

### Engineer Configuration

Setup and configuration guides:

- [CLAUDE.md Setup](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/configuration/claude-md.md): CLAUDE.md configuration
- [Hooks](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/configuration/hooks.md): Hook system configuration
- [MCP Setup](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/configuration/mcp-setup.md): MCP server setup
- [Workflows](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/configuration/workflows.md): Workflow configuration

### Engineer Skills

- [Skills Overview](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills.md): Complete skill reference

#### Core Skills
- [cook](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/cook.md): End-to-end feature implementation
- [fix](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/fix.md): Intelligent bug fixing
- [debug](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/debug.md): Systematic debugging
- [test](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/test.md): Comprehensive testing
- [bootstrap](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/bootstrap.md): Project scaffolding
- [ask](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/ask.md): Technical questions
- [brainstorm](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/brainstorm.md): Idea exploration
- [scout](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/scout.md): Codebase exploration
- [plan](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/plan.md): Implementation planning
- [preview](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/preview.md): File and visual preview
- [journal](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/journal.md): Decision journaling
- [kanban](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/kanban.md): Task board management
- [watzup](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/watzup.md): Project status summary
- [ck-help](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/ck-help.md): ClaudeKit help
- [use-mcp](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/use-mcp.md): MCP tool usage
- [coding-level](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/coding-level.md): Set coding experience level
- [find-skills](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/find-skills.md): Discover available skills

#### Frontend Development
- [frontend-development](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/frontend-development.md): Frontend patterns
- [frontend-design](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/frontend-design.md): Design implementation
- [web-frameworks](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/web-frameworks.md): Framework guides (Next.js, Turborepo)
- [ui-styling](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/ui-styling.md): shadcn/ui and Tailwind styling
- [ui-ux-pro-max](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/ui-ux-pro-max.md): Professional UI/UX design
- [react-best-practices](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/react-best-practices.md): React performance optimization
- [threejs](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/threejs.md): 3D graphics with Three.js
- [tanstack](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/tanstack.md): TanStack Start, Form, and AI
- [web-design-guidelines](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/web-design-guidelines.md): Web interface guidelines
- [web-testing](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/web-testing.md): Playwright, Vitest, k6 testing
- [shader](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/shader.md): GLSL fragment shaders
- [remotion](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/remotion.md): Video creation in React
- [mintlify](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/mintlify.md): Mintlify docs site builder

#### Backend Development
- [backend-development](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/backend-development.md): Server-side patterns
- [databases](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/databases.md): Database patterns
- [better-auth](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/better-auth.md): Authentication framework
- [payment-integration](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/payment-integration.md): Payment systems

- [context-engineering](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/context-engineering.md): AI context optimization

#### Mobile Development
- [mobile-development](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/mobile-development.md): Mobile app patterns

#### DevOps & Infrastructure

#### Design & Media

#### Development Tools
- [git](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/git.md): Git operations
- [copywriting](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/copywriting.md): Conversion copy

- [chrome-devtools](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/engineer/skills/chrome-devtools.md): Browser debugging

- [shader](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/shader.md): GLSL shaders
- [remotion](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/remotion.md): Video in React
- [worktree](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/worktree.md): Git worktree

#### Tools & Utilities
- [ai-artist](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/ai-artist.md): AI art generation
- [ai-multimodal](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/ai-multimodal.md): Multimodal AI
- [media-processing](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/media-processing.md): Media processing
- [mermaidjs-v11](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/mermaidjs-v11.md): Mermaid diagrams
- [markdown-novel-viewer](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/markdown-novel-viewer.md): Markdown viewer
- [repomix](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/repomix.md): Repository packaging
- [mcp-builder](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/mcp-builder.md): MCP server creation
- [mcp-management](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/mcp-management.md): MCP administration
- [google-adk-python](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/google-adk-python.md): Google ADK
- [skill-creator](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/skill-creator.md): Custom skills
- [template-skill](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/template-skill.md): Skill templates
- [preview](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/preview.md): Preview files
- [docs](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/docs.md): Documentation
- [docs-seeker](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/docs-seeker.md): Docs search
- [git](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/git.md): Git operations
- [journal](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/journal.md): Journaling
- [kanban](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/kanban.md): Task board
- [plans-kanban](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/plans-kanban.md): Plans dashboard
- [code-review](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/code-review.md): Code review
- [debugging](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/debugging.md): Debugging
- [problem-solving](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/problem-solving.md): Problem solving
- [sequential-thinking](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/sequential-thinking.md): Sequential thinking
- [context-engineering](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/marketing/skills/context-engineering.md): Context engineering

## Workflows

Cross-kit workflow guides:

- [Workflows Overview](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/workflows.md): Complete workflow guide

### Engineering Workflows
- [Adding Features](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/workflows/adding-feature.md): Feature implementation
- [Fixing Bugs](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/workflows/fixing-bugs.md): Bug fixing patterns
- [Documentation](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/workflows/documentation.md): Documentation workflow
- [Building APIs](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/workflows/building-api.md): API development
- [Implementing Auth](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/workflows/implementing-auth.md): Authentication
- [Integrating Payment](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/workflows/integrating-payment.md): Payment systems
- [Optimizing Performance](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/workflows/optimizing-performance.md): Performance tuning
- [Refactoring Code](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/workflows/refactoring-code.md): Code refactoring
- [New Project](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/workflows/new-project.md): Starting new projects
- [Existing Project](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/workflows/existing-project.md): Existing codebases
- [Maintaining Old Project](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/workflows/maintaining-old-project.md): Legacy maintenance
- [Understanding Codebases with GKG](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/workflows/understanding-codebases-with-gkg.md): Codebase analysis
- [Gemini Integration](https://docs.claudekit.cc/docs/workflows/gemini.md): Gemini AI workflows
